title: Iron Sword
description: A sturdy iron blade, the workhorse of warriors throughout the realm. Three iron ingots are heated until glowing, then hammered together on the anvil and shaped into a double-edged blade. A leather strip wraps the tang to form a serviceable grip.

title: Steel Sword
description: A well-crafted steel blade that holds an edge better than iron and strikes harder in battle. The process requires careful temperature control and repeated folding to eliminate impurities. Only skilled smiths can produce quality steel weapons.

title: Iron Dagger
description: A simple iron dagger, useful for everything from cutting rope to cutting throats. Even novice smiths can produce serviceable daggers, making them common throughout the realm.

title: Wooden Bow
description: A hunting bow crafted from flexible wood, capable of bringing down game at moderate distances. The wood must be properly seasoned and shaped to provide the right balance of power and reliability.

title: Leather Armor
description: Basic leather protection that provides mobility while stopping glancing blows. Multiple layers of treated leather are stitched together and reinforced at vital points. Light enough for all-day wear but limited against heavy weapons.

title: Chain Mail
description: Interlocking metal rings woven into a protective mesh that can turn sword cuts and arrow points. Creating chain mail is labor-intensive work, requiring thousands of rings to be individually linked. The result is flexible protection that has saved countless lives.

title: Health Potion
description: A basic healing potion brewed from red herbs known for their restorative properties. The herbs must be carefully prepared and combined with purified water, then left to steep until the mixture takes on a deep crimson color. Drinking the potion accelerates the body's natural healing.

title: Arrows (10)
description: A bundle of arrows suitable for hunting or combat. Each arrow requires a straight wooden shaft, iron head, and fletching. Mass production allows archers to keep their quivers full without breaking the purse.

title: Lockpick
description: A thin metal tool shaped for manipulating lock mechanisms. Quality lockpicks require precise bending and tempering to achieve the right combination of flexibility and strength. Possession of lockpicks is technically illegal in most jurisdictions, though enforcement varies.

title: Repair Kit
description: A collection of tools and materials for field repairs of weapons and armor. Includes files, whetstones, wire, leather patches, and other supplies needed to keep equipment functional away from a proper forge. Experienced adventurers never travel without one.

title: Smelt Iron Ingot
description: Raw iron ore must be smelted to remove impurities before it can be worked. The ore is heated in a furnace until it liquefies, allowing the slag to separate and drain away. The remaining iron is cast into ingots for storage and later use.

title: Forge Steel Ingot
description: Steel is created by combining iron with carefully measured amounts of carbon under controlled conditions. The process requires skill and experience, as too much carbon makes the metal brittle while too little leaves it soft. Quality steel commands premium prices throughout the realm.

title: Cut Leather Strips
description: Leather strips are used in countless applications, from weapon grips to armor straps to simple bindings. A single piece of cured leather can be cut into multiple strips with a sharp knife and steady hand.

title: Regeneration Potion
description: A potent healing draught brewed from troll blood. The regenerative properties of the troll are captured in liquid form, granting the drinker rapid healing over time. The process requires careful extraction and purification to remove toxins.

title: Poison Vial
description: Concentrated basilisk venom distilled into a weapon coating. A single application can turn any blade into a deadly poisoned weapon. Handle with extreme care - even experienced alchemists have lost fingers to careless handling.

title: Agility Elixir
description: A fizzing dark potion brewed from bat wings. The essence of the bat's supernatural agility is captured, temporarily enhancing the drinker's reflexes and movement speed. Favored by thieves and assassins.

title: Strength Tonic
description: A thick, meaty brew made from beast heart and restorative herbs. Grants the raw power of a great beast for a limited time. Warriors drink this before major battles to gain an edge in combat.

title: Fur Cloak
description: A warm, protective cloak crafted from wolf pelts. Multiple pelts are stitched together with leather bindings to create a garment that protects against both cold weather and enemy attacks. Popular among rangers and northern travelers.

title: Troll Hide Armor
description: Heavy armor crafted from the thick hide of a troll. The troll's regenerative properties persist in the cured leather, slowly repairing damage over time. A masterwork of the armorer's craft that requires significant skill to create.

title: Basilisk Scale Mail
description: Armor crafted by overlaying basilisk scales onto a chainmail base. The scales provide exceptional protection and retain some of the basilisk's resistance to petrification. Only master armorers can properly work with these rare materials.

title: Wyvern Scale Armor
description: The pinnacle of scaled armor, crafted from wyvern scales reinforced with steel. Lighter than any metal armor yet stronger than most, with natural resistance to poison. Creating this armor is considered a masterwork achievement.

title: Venomous Dagger
description: An iron dagger permanently coated with basilisk venom. The venom is alchemically bonded to the blade, delivering poison with every strike. A favorite weapon of assassins who prefer a subtle approach.

title: Ember Blade
description: A steel sword infused with ember dust and bound with soul essence. The blade glows with perpetual inner heat, searing enemies on contact. Creating this enchanted weapon requires both smithing skill and arcane knowledge.

title: Silk Rope
description: Strong, lightweight rope woven from spider silk. Pound for pound stronger than hemp rope yet far lighter. Essential for climbing, binding, or any situation requiring reliable cordage. Highly valued by adventurers and climbers.

title: Rat Poison
description: A noxious powder ground from rat tails and bitter herbs. Originally developed for pest control, creative individuals have found other uses - poisoning food supplies, coating weapons, or eliminating unwanted guests.
